summary.intent: Update the Gossamer session detail view to read from new LogEvent/LogContent tables instead of original Event tables, and add full-text search over log content using SQLite FTS5.
summary.outcome: Successfully migrated SessionDetail.tsx to use a new /api/v2/sessions/:id/log-events endpoint with a conversion layer that maps LogEvent rows to pseudo-Event objects, keeping all existing UI components unchanged. Also built a working FTS5 search module with a /api/search endpoint, indexing 4,456 content rows.

repo: Project is 'gossamer' at /Users/stephanostsoucas/gossamer — Electron app with electron-vite, backend at src/server.ts (Node.js), frontend at app/src/renderer/src/
Database is SQLite at ~/.claude/hook-handler.db using better-sqlite3, accessed via src/db.ts getDb()
LogEvent table has sessionId, type, timestamp (stored as ISO text), data (JSON). Types include: user, assistant, system/stop_hook_summary, last-prompt, queue-operation
LogContent table has contentType (text/thinking/tool_use/tool_result), plus fields: text, thinking, toolResultContent, toolInput, toolName, logEventId
Server runs on port 3000, started with: node dist/handler.js serve --db ~/.claude/hook-handler.db --port 3000
Indexer runs indexAllCheckpointsV2 — FTS sync should be hooked at the end of each indexing pass

The conversion from LogEvent→Event: user+text→UserPromptSubmit, user+tool_result→PostToolUse/PostToolUseFailure, assistant+tool_use→PreToolUse, assistant+text→accumulated for next Stop, system/stop_hook_summary→Stop, first event generates virtual SessionStart

code.finding: New module: setupLogContentFts, syncLogContentFts, rebuildLogContentFts, searchLogContent. FTS5 indexes text/thinking/toolResultContent/toolInput fields. Uses BM25 ranking and «match» snippet highlighting. Supports FTS5 syntax.
New endpoints: GET /api/v2/sessions/:id/log-events (returns nested LogEvent with contents/usage/hookProgress/systemData) and GET /api/search?q=TEXT&limit=N (FTS5 search)
Added LogContentBlock and LogEventItem types, plus fetchLogEvents(id) function
Added logEventsToEvents() conversion function; replaced fetchSessionEvents call with fetchLogEvents + logEventsToEvents

workflow: Background server can be started with >> /tmp/gossamer-server.log 2>&1 & for persistent logging
FTS5 sync is safe to call repeatedly — uses rowid-based incremental insert to avoid duplicates
npx tsc --noEmit used for type checking both backend (root) and frontend (app/) separately
Autofill errors in electron-vite dev mode are harmless and can be ignored

friction: Server restart required after build but wasn't running when user checked — background process had exited silently
Initial server start attempt with --repo flag failed (flag not recognized), required checking --help first
last-prompt and queue-operation event types had no contents and were silently skipped — required investigation to confirm this was correct behavior
open_items: last-prompt events (contain initial user prompt metadata) are currently skipped in logEventsToEvents — could potentially be surfaced in the UI
queue-operation events are silently dropped — their structure and potential UI value not fully explored
FTS index rebuild endpoint (rebuildLogContentFts) is implemented but not exposed via HTTP
No UI frontend for search — only the backend /api/search endpoint exists
